player/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Remove the exclusion of junit-vintage-engine from spring-boot-starter-test, as it is no longer needed or compatible in the new Spring Boot version.
Replace maven-compiler-plugin source and target configuration with the release flag, which is the standard for Java 9+ and required for proper module path handling in newer JDKs.
player/pom.xml.why_exists: Using source/target with Java 21 may cause warnings or errors regarding module system compatibility; release is the preferred and often required configuration.
